storylets.title: {=floor_order_shift_pursuit_cancelled_title}Pursuit called off
storylets.setup: {=floor_order_shift_pursuit_cancelled_setup}The pursuit is called off. Back to the column, the sergeant says, and spits. The horses were just warming to the chase. Nobody asks what changed up the line.

storylets.title: {=floor_order_shift_target_changes_title}New target
storylets.setup: {=floor_order_shift_target_changes_setup}New target. Some lord's cousin had a bright idea, or so the muttering goes. The maps come out again and the runners are sent off with fresh orders for the vanguard.

options.tooltip: {=floor_order_shift_target_changes_tt}Reorient to the new heading. No effect.

storylets.title: {=floor_order_shift_return_to_base_title}Back to garrison
storylets.setup: {=floor_order_shift_return_to_base_setup}Orders came back: return to garrison. Whatever the march was for, it is over before it started. The men grouse about wasted boot leather and nobody argues with them.

storylets.title: {=floor_order_shift_position_held_title}Hold the position
storylets.setup: {=floor_order_shift_position_held_setup}Hold the position, the runner says, breathing hard. Whatever was out there isn't coming. The line settles back into the mud it had just finished rising from.

storylets.title: {=floor_order_shift_formation_changes_title}Formation shift
storylets.setup: {=floor_order_shift_formation_changes_setup}Formation shift. The sergeant curses through every adjustment, by the numbers, by the book, and by the man who thought of it. The line lurches into its new shape anyway.

options.tooltip: {=floor_order_shift_formation_changes_tt}Take the new place in line. No effect.
